title: My life is a litmus test
summary: I’m never quite sure what pursuits might strike my fancy; so I’ll try most anything & study it like a litmus test. Toss that shit into a petry dish, stir it up, & dip my awareness into it. what color did that thing turn? I won’t know until I try. ... content:
I’m never quite sure what pursuits might strike my fancy; so I’ll try most anything & study it like a litmus test. Toss that shit into a petry dish, stir it up, & dip my awareness into it.  what     color     did     that     thing     turn?  I won’t know until I try. ... Read more
